Aubrey Modiba.note: South Africa's left-side outlet, useful for width, set-piece service, and recovery defending when the flank opens.
Aubrey Modiba.noteZh: 奥布里·莫迪巴是南非左路出口，能提供宽度、定位球传球，并在边路打开时回追防守。

Bradley Cross.summary: Bradley Cross is a South Africa left-back from Kaizer Chiefs who adds wide defending, left-footed balance, and recovery speed to the national team.
Bradley Cross.note: South Africa's left-back cover, giving them a natural left foot, recovery speed, and steadier wide defending.
Bradley Cross.noteZh: 布拉德利·克罗斯是南非左后卫保障，能提供天然左脚、回追速度和更稳定的边路防守。

Evidence Makgopa.note: South Africa's target-forward option, useful for aerial pressure, hold-up touches, and finishing from direct service.
Evidence Makgopa.noteZh: 埃维登斯·马克戈帕是南非支点前锋选择，能施加空中压力、背身做球，并接应直接传球终结。

Ime Okon.note: South Africa's young centre-back, bringing composure, aerial defending, and long-term upside against stronger attacks.
Ime Okon.noteZh: 伊梅·奥孔是南非年轻中卫，面对强队时能带来沉稳、空中防守和长期潜力。

Iqraam Rayners.note: South Africa's sharp penalty-box runner, built for quick finishes, pressing runs, and small openings around goal.
Iqraam Rayners.noteZh: 伊克拉姆·雷纳斯是南非敏锐的禁区跑动点，擅长快速终结、压迫跑动和抓住门前小空当。

Jayden Adams.note: South Africa's mobile midfielder, helping them carry through pressure and support the press after turnovers.
Jayden Adams.noteZh: 杰登·亚当斯是南非机动型中场，能带球穿过压力，并在丢球后支援压迫。

Kamogelo Sebelebele.note: South Africa's energetic midfield option, giving them wide support, second-ball pressure, and fresh running.
Kamogelo Sebelebele.noteZh: 卡莫盖洛·塞贝莱贝莱是南非活力型中场选择，能提供边路支援、第二落点压迫和新鲜跑动。

Khuliso Mudau.note: South Africa's right-back engine, strong in duels, overlaps, and recovery runs against quick wide players.
Khuliso Mudau.noteZh: 库利索·穆道是南非右后卫发动机，对抗、套边和回追速度型边路球员都很重要。

Khulumani Ndamane.note: South Africa's centre-back depth, useful for aerial cover, compact defending, and simple passes out.
Khulumani Ndamane.noteZh: 库卢马尼·恩达马内是南非中卫深度，能提供空中覆盖、紧凑防守和简洁出球。

Lyle Foster.note: South Africa's highest-profile forward, running channels, holding up direct balls, and carrying the main scoring burden.
Lyle Foster.noteZh: 莱尔·福斯特是南非最受关注的前锋，能冲击通道、背身拿住直传，并承担主要进球责任。

Mbekezeli Mbokazi.note: South Africa's standout young centre-back, giving them left-footed passing, calm defending, and unusual leadership for his age.
Mbekezeli Mbokazi.noteZh: 姆贝克泽利·姆博卡齐是南非突出的年轻中卫，能提供左脚出球、冷静防守和超出年龄的领导力。

Nkosinathi Sibisi.note: South Africa's experienced centre-back, useful for aerial duels, box protection, and late defensive organization.
Nkosinathi Sibisi.noteZh: 恩科西纳蒂·西比西是南非经验型中卫，能争顶、保护禁区，并在后段组织防守。

Olwethu Makhanya.note: South Africa's athletic defensive option, giving them recovery speed, centre-back depth, and a higher ceiling.
Olwethu Makhanya.noteZh: 奥尔韦图·马坎亚是南非运动能力强的防守选择，能提供回追速度、中卫深度和更高潜力。

Oswin Appollis.note: South Africa's attacking spark, able to beat the first defender and slip the final pass when space opens.
Oswin Appollis.noteZh: 奥斯温·阿波利斯是南非进攻火花，能过掉第一名防守人，并在空间出现时送出最后一传。

Relebohile Mofokeng.note: South Africa's fearless young creator, bringing quick feet, left-side carries, and invention against deep blocks.
Relebohile Mofokeng.noteZh: 雷莱博希莱·莫福肯是南非无畏的年轻创造者，能用快脚、左路带球和灵感冲击低位防守。

Ricardo Goss.note: South Africa's goalkeeper cover, giving them shot-stopping depth and a vocal option behind Williams.
Ricardo Goss.noteZh: 里卡多·戈斯是南非门将保障，能在威廉姆斯身后提供扑救深度和清晰指挥。

Ronwen Williams.note: South Africa's captain and goalkeeper anchor, trusted for penalty saves, distribution calm, and defensive command.
Ronwen Williams.noteZh: 龙文·威廉姆斯是南非队长和门将核心，点球扑救、冷静出球和防线指挥都值得信任。

Samukele Kabini.note: South Africa's European-based left-back, giving them recovery speed, wide defending, and a fresher outlet.
Samukele Kabini.noteZh: 萨穆凯莱·卡比尼是南非效力欧洲的左后卫，能提供回追速度、边路防守和更有活力的出口。

Sipho Chaine.note: South Africa's domestic goalkeeper option, useful for reaction saves and keeping the back line organized.
Sipho Chaine.noteZh: 西福·查伊内是南非本土门将选择，能完成反应扑救，并保持后防线组织。

Sphephelo Sithole.note: South Africa's rangy midfielder, using size, ball-winning, and simple tempo control to steady the middle.
Sphephelo Sithole.noteZh: 斯菲费洛·西托莱是南非覆盖范围大的中场，能用身材、抢球和简洁节奏控制稳住中路。

Teboho Mokoena.note: South Africa's midfield reference point, dangerous from range and important for set pieces and tempo.
Teboho Mokoena.noteZh: 特博霍·莫科纳是南非中场参照点，远射有威胁，也对定位球和节奏很重要。

Thabang Matuludi.note: South Africa's right-back cover, useful for wide tackling, support runs, and late-game defensive energy.
Thabang Matuludi.noteZh: 塔邦·马图卢迪是南非右后卫保障，能边路抢断、支援跑动，并在比赛后段提供防守体能。

Thalente Mbatha.note: South Africa's defensive midfield bite, helping them press counters early and recycle possession quickly.
Thalente Mbatha.noteZh: 塔伦特·姆巴塔是南非防守型中场硬度来源，能提前压制反击并快速回收球权。

Thapelo Maseko.note: South Africa's wide-speed threat, useful for direct dribbling, transition runs, and stretching tired full-backs.
Thapelo Maseko.noteZh: 塔佩洛·马塞科是南非边路速度威胁，能直接盘带、转换冲刺，并拉扯疲劳边后卫。

Themba Zwane.note: South Africa's veteran creator, bringing calm touches between lines and better decisions near the box.
Themba Zwane.noteZh: 滕巴·兹瓦内是南非老将创造者，能在线间冷静触球，并在禁区附近做出更好选择。

Tshepang Moremi.note: South Africa's bench-speed winger, able to carry directly and test defenders once the match opens up.
Tshepang Moremi.noteZh: 采潘·莫雷米是南非替补速度型边锋，能直接带球，并在比赛打开后考验防守人。
